currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Evidence Summary v1 is accepted locally: schema, builder, persistence API, runtime artifact generation, Context Packet evidence integration, full workspace tests, build, launchers, and e2e all pass.

doneWhenChecklist.label: Evidence Summary v1 schema 已定义并从 domain 导出
runtime 可以从验证命令结果和 artifact refs 生成 evidence summary
Context Packet 可以从 evidence summary 补充 evidence

knownGaps: .threadsmith/context/evidence-summary.json is intentionally ignored as a regenerable runtime artifact, not committed truth.
Role-specific Packets v1 and Control Deck Context Surface are planned later slices, not part of Evidence Summary v1.
Raw stdout/stderr logs should remain artifact refs, not be copied into context packet.
